zh.lifeSummary: 當Vincent DeMoleyns於1278年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾斯托克 波格斯時，他的父親Roger DeMoels40歲，母親Alice Prouz-32歲。他去世於1335年在英國倫敦享年57歲。

zh-hans.Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England: 英国巴金哈姆爾斯托克 波格斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Vincent DeMoleyns于1278年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾斯托克 波格斯时，他的父亲Roger DeMoels40岁，母亲Alice Prouz-32岁。他去世于1335年在英国倫敦享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Vincent
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old French form of the Latin name Vincens ‘conquering’ (genitive Vincentis). This name was borne by various early saints particularly associated with France, most notably the 5th-century St Vincent of Lérins .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Vincent DeMoleyns was born in 1278, in Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Roger DeMoels, was 40 and his mother, Alice Prouz, was -32. He died in 1335, in London, England, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Vincent DeMoleyns est né en 1278, à Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Roger DeMoels, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Alice Prouz, avait -32 ans. Il est décédé en 1335, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Vincent DeMoleyns 1278 in Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger DeMoels 40 und seine Mutter Alice Prouz -32. Er starb 1335 im Alter von 57 Jahren in London, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Vincent DeMoleyns è nato il nel 1278 nel Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, Roger DeMoels, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Alice Prouz, aveva -32 anni. Morì nel 1335, nel London, England, all'età di 57 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Vincent DeMoleyns(이)가 1278년 영국 벅잉함실르 스토크 포그스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger DeMoels(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Prouz(은)는 -32세였다. 그는 1335년 영국 런던에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Vincent DeMoleyns nasceu em 1278, em Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger DeMoels, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Alice Prouz, tinha -32 anos. Ele faleceu em 1335, em London, Inglaterra, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Vincent DeMoleyns родился в 1278 г. в местности сток погесь, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger DeMoels было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Prouz, -32. Он умер в 1335 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Vincent DeMoleyns nació en 1278, en Stoke Poges, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger DeMoels, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Alice Prouz, tenía -32 años. Murió en 1335, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años.
